:PROPERTIES:
:corpus-source:   ROBOT-report
:corpus-id:       broken-multi
:corpus-severity: -
:corpus-url:      https://robot.obolibrary.org/report_queries/
:corpus-expects:  planned/robot-report-multi-violations
:corpus-rationale: Deliberately trips several ROBOT report queries at
 once (missing label, missing definition, duplicate label).  Doubles
 as the worked example for the M7 documentation screenshot.  ELOT
 lint and ROBOT `convert' must succeed; only `robot report' should
 flag violations.
:END:
#+title: ROBOT report -- multi-violation fixture

* corpus-rr-broken
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: corpus-rr-broken
:ELOT-context-type: ontology
:ELOT-context-localname: corpus-rr-broken
:ELOT-default-prefix: ex:
:header-args:omn: :tangle no
:END:

:PROPERTIES:
:prefixdefs: yes
:END:
| prefix | uri                                   |
|--------+---------------------------------------|
| owl:   | http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#        |
| rdfs:  | http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema# |
| ex:    | http://example.org/corpus/rr-broken/  |

** corpus-rr-broken ontology (ex:corpus-rr-broken ex:corpus-rr-broken/0.0)

:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
 - owl:versionInfo :: 0.0

** Classes
:PROPERTIES:
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
*** Twin one (ex:twin1)
 - rdfs:label :: "Twin"@en
*** Twin two (ex:twin2)
 - rdfs:label :: "Twin"@en
*** Unlabelled (ex:unlabelled)
 - rdfs:comment :: A class deliberately missing rdfs:label.
*** Undefined (ex:undefined)
 - rdfs:label :: "Undefined"@en
